description: Questo sub-concetto distingue tra odori che sono familiari e confortanti e quelli che sono nuovi, inaspettati o potenzialmente allarmanti.
positive: A sudden whiff of *wichtig* spice, a jarring note in the otherwise familiar kitchen air.
The scent of *selva* felt alien, prickling my nostrils with an unknown pungency.
An unexpected *stranger* aroma assaulted my nose, a confusing, unfamiliar wave.
The air held a *nebulosa* smell, distant and unsettling, a complete mystery to my senses.
My nose registered *nuovo* – an unfamiliar, sharp odor, distinct and perplexing.
A strange, *obsoleta* fragrance lingered, causing a momentary disorientation in my breathing.
The *ignota* scent triggered a vague sense of unease, a feeling of something not quite right.
A completely *unbekannte* smell filled the room, a startling and disorienting sensation.
This *desconocido* aroma felt wrong, a jarring intrusion on my olfactory landscape.
A sharp, *ignarus* smell caught me off guard, causing a brief, involuntary recoil.
The unfamiliar scent, *étrange*, felt like an intrusion, a puzzle my brain couldn't solve.
A completely novel *straniero* scent invaded my sinuses, a confusing and unsettling experience.
My nostrils flared at the *nuova* smell, a foreign presence in my usual sensory world.
An *ignotis* odor, sharp and unusual, caused a slight tightening in my chest.
The *neu* scent was startling, a sudden and unexpected disruption of my comfort.
A *sconosciuta* aroma, sharp and unfamiliar, made me wrinkle my nose instinctively.
The *étrangère* smell triggered a faint feeling of apprehension, a sense of something amiss.
A completely *unfamiliar* odor brushed against my nostrils, a confusing and unsettling sensation.
This *desconocida* scent felt alien, a jarring note in the familiar background.
The *unbekanntes* smell was unexpected, a sudden and disconcerting olfactory experience.
negative: The familiar scent of baking bread, a comforting warmth filling my nose and throat.
The *confortante* smell of lavender soothed me, a gentle and familiar embrace.
A comforting *familiare* scent, like my grandmother’s kitchen, eased my tension.
The *tranquilla* fragrance of pine needles brought back memories of childhood holidays.
The smell of freshly cut grass, a *rassicurante* reminder of summer days past.
The *habituel* scent of cinnamon and apples evoked feelings of warmth and nostalgia.
That *familiar* smell of old books, a comforting presence in the quiet library.
The *vertraute* smell of coffee brewing, a welcome routine in the morning light.
The *conocido* aroma of vanilla brought a sense of peace and contentment.
A *familiaris* scent, like rain on warm asphalt, soothed my senses.
The *habituelle* smell of chamomile tea calmed my nerves, a gentle and comforting presence.
That *familiare* scent of sunshine on dry earth, a grounding and reassuring feeling.
The *familiar* smell of my mother's perfume, a source of comfort and security.
The *vertraut* smell of woodsmoke, a reminder of cozy evenings by the fire.
A *conocida* fragrance of orange blossoms, bringing a sense of tranquility.
The *familiaris* smell of leather and polish, a comforting and nostalgic scent.
The *habituel* aroma of freshly laundered linen, a feeling of clean comfort.
That *familiar* smell of my own skin, a comforting and grounding sensation.
The *vertraute* smell of my dog's fur, a source of unconditional love and comfort.
A *conocido* scent of roses, evoking feelings of peace and serenity.
